**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
so AI is the main feature of OptiQra and with would come AI suggested fixes, AI optimizations and more

**Describe the solution you'd like**
So i want the user to select the ai they have the key for and then  just type in their api key and then for each seo problem the site has insted of "mark resovled" its "get AI fix" and you click on it and then boom the AI responds with a clear and concise fix targeted directly at the site in question insted of a genric fix for each problem. the AI could also go and detect UX problems or suggest UI optimizations or so much more, just imagine the possibilities.
